inputs.label: Nightly Rate
inputs.businessContext: The base cost per night of the rental.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base cost per night of the rental.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiralık konutun gece başına taban maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Basiskosten pro Nacht der Miete.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de base par nuit de la location.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste base por noche del alquiler.

inputs.label: Number of Nights
inputs.businessContext: Total nights the rental is booked.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total nights the rental is booked.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Nächte, in denen die Unterkunft gebucht ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de nuits de location.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الليالي التي تم حجز الإيجار فيها.

inputs.label: Cleaning Fee
inputs.businessContext: One-time cleaning fee added to the total.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time cleaning fee added to the total.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam tutara eklenen tek seferlik temizlik ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einmalige Reinigungsgebühr, die zum Gesamtbetrag hinzugefügt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de ménage uniques ajoutés au total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa de limpieza única añadida al total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم تنظيف لمرة واحدة تضاف إلى الإجمالي.

inputs.label: Service Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Service fee as a percentage of the rental cost after any discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Service fee as a percentage of the rental cost after any discounts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimler sonrası kiralama maliyetinin yüzdesi olarak hizmet ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Servicegebühr als Prozentsatz der Mietkosten nach etwaigen Rabatten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de service en pourcentage du coût de location après remises.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión de servicio como porcentaje del coste de alquiler después de descuentos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم الخدمة كنسبة مئوية من تكلفة الإيجار بعد أي خصومات.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Tax percentage applied to the pre-tax total.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax percentage applied to the pre-tax total.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi öncesi toplama uygulanan vergi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuerprozentsatz, der auf den Nettobetrag vor Steuern angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe appliqué au total avant taxes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto aplicado al total antes de impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الضريبة المطبقة على الإجمالي قبل الضريبة.

inputs.label: Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Discount percentage applied to the base rental cost (nightly rate × nights).

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount percentage applied to the base rental cost (nightly rate × nights).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel kiralama maliyetine (gecelik ücret × gece sayısı) uygulanan indirim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rabattprozentsatz, der auf die Basismietkosten angewendet wird (Nachtpreis × Nächte).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise appliqué au coût de location de base (tarif nuit × nuits).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de descuento aplicado al coste base del alquiler (tarifa nocturna × noches).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الخصم المطبقة على تكلفة الإيجار الأساسية (السعر الليلي × الليالي).
